Ntc And Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David A. Gabianelli, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: The Brazos Higher Education Services Corporation, Inc.; Roderick anthony McLeod, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Educations Fincance Partners.

RULING:
HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff The Brazos Higher Education Services Corporation's Application For Right To Attach Order And Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $1,247,961.38. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
